description: Dynamic bridge between scheduled runs. Each run reads this file, applies its learnings, does its work, then OVERWRITES this file with updated context for the next run. This is the memory of the intelligence system.

pattern_alerts.description: Geopolitical binary underweighting — markets price best-case scenarios sooner than consensus forecasts
Defense sector duration premium — maximized in 2-6 week ceasefire (managed tension), not instant peace
Gold retains/elevates ahead of binary geopolitical events as hedging demand increases — this is a SELL SIGNAL, not a hold signal
pattern_alerts.status: OBSERVING — needs 1 more for framework promotion. SETFGOLD still elevated at ~₹128 into April 10 talks day.

pattern_alerts.description: On ceasefire Day 2, Trump off-the-cuff comment on Iran caused Nifty -0.93%. The same actor who announces ceasefires can re-introduce doubt informally.

FII net SOLD ₹2,811.97 Cr on April 8 ceasefire day despite Nifty +3.78%. FII used geopolitical relief rally as exit/distribution opportunity. DII bought ₹4,168.17 Cr to support market. Ceasefire rallies driven purely by DIIs are structurally fragile.

framework_updates_implemented.name: Geopolitical Binary Underweighting
framework_updates_implemented.rule: For any 3-outcome binary forecast, include explicit REVERSAL TRIGGER: 'If best-case materializes → regime flips, index +2-4%'. Do not rely on probability weighting alone.

framework_updates_implemented.name: Defense Sector Duration Premium
framework_updates_implemented.rule: Before making defense stock predictions, model the DURATION of tension. 2-6 weeks managed tension = HOLD/ADD defense. Instant peace = REDUCE defense. Acute escalation = defense spikes then reverses.

framework_updates_implemented.name: Central Bank Calendar Synchronization
framework_updates_implemented.rule: Always check RBI/Fed meeting calendar when forecasting on binary geopolitical event days. Same-day policy decisions can amplify moves by 1-2%.

framework_updates_pending.name: Gold Pre-Binary-Event Hedging
framework_updates_pending.observation: SETFGOLD at ₹128.21 on April 9 morning — UP from ₹125.59 close despite ceasefire Day 2. Pattern: gold retains/temporarily elevates ahead of binary geopolitical events. This is a SELL SIGNAL (exit into hedge-demand premium).

framework_updates_pending.name: Post-Ceasefire Headline Ambiguity Risk
framework_updates_pending.observation: Trump's informal comment 'remains tense until real pact' on ceasefire Day 2 caused Nifty -0.93%. Same actor who announced ceasefire can re-introduce doubt. Markets interpret ambiguity as risk. Forecast should add explicit 'headline risk discount' for Days 2-3 of ceasefires.

prompt_for_morning_brief:
You are an expert market intelligence agent. Today is {{DATE}}. THE ISLAMABAD TALKS HAPPENED TODAY (April 10). This is the #1 regime-defining event.

FIRST ACTION — BEFORE ANYTHING ELSE:
- Search 'Islamabad talks outcome April 10 2026' and 'US Iran Vance Araghchi Pakistan talks result'
- Determine which scenario played out: TALKS_PROGRESS (ceasefire extended), TALKS_NEUTRAL (ongoing), TALKS_FAIL (breakdown)
- Apply regime decision tree:
  - TALKS_PROGRESS → DE-ESCALATION_DEEPENING: Extend ADANI PORT (P019), accelerate SETFGOLD exit (sell all), ASTRA MICRO defense premium may unwind (watch ₹980-1,000)
  - TALKS_NEUTRAL → DE-ESCALATION_REAL continues: Maintain positions, focus on TCS reaction, next review April 22
  - TALKS_FAIL → WAR_PREMIUM_RETURN: Re-activate A002 (INDIGO SELL), hold ALL SETFGOLD, ASTRA MICRO new high potential, Nifty gap-down -2-3%

SECOND CRITICAL CHECK:
- TCS opening price April 10 — did it gap above ₹2,600? Score P018 status. TCS Q4 results were a STRONG BEAT (revenue ₹70,698 cr, TCV $12B record, ₹31 dividend). Expected gap-up to ₹2,620-2,640.
- What is Nifty IT doing April 10? P014 (Nifty IT outperform 4W) confidence now 4★.

APRIL 9 EOD CONTEXT (confirmed):
- Nifty closed 23,775.10 (-0.93%) — below forecast range. Trump Iran comment dampened optimism.
- TCS Q4FY26 results (post-market): Revenue ₹70,698 cr (BEAT), PAT ₹13,718 cr, TCV $12B (highest ever), ₹31 dividend, AI $2.3B. Overall: STRONG BEAT.
- TCS closed ₹2,587.75 before results. P018 (>₹2,600) expected to cross threshold on April 10 open.
- SETFGOLD at ₹128+ (elevated on talks-hedging). A005 exit window ACTIVE.
- ASTRA MICRO at ~₹1,019. A008 partial profit at ₹1,048-1,052 should be active.
- FII April 8 data: provisional estimates ~₹4,500 Cr buying (ceasefire day) — confirm official NSE data.

PREDICTIONS APPROACHING CHECK DATES:
- P012 (ASTRA MICRO ₹1,050-1,080): check April 14 — 4 days. Talks outcome critical.
- P013 (INDIGO <₹4,100): check April 14 — WILL SCORE WRONG.
- P015 (INDIGO >₹4,150): check April 15 — WILL SCORE RIGHT.
- P016 (Nifty 23,900-24,100): check April 15 — UNCERTAIN, talks-dependent.
- P018 (TCS >₹2,600): likely crosses threshold today on gap-up. Confidence 4★.
- P019 (ADANI PORT ₹1,490-1,540): talks-dependent.
- P020 (SETFGOLD ₹120-122): talks-dependent. A005 exit window active.
- P021 (TCS ₹2,650-2,700): NEW April 9. Check April 16.

FRAMEWORK REMINDERS:
- Apply FORECAST_PAT003 (geopolitical binary underweighting): best-case reversal trigger = if talks progress → Nifty +1.5-2%
- Apply M012 (defense duration premium): talks progress = defense stocks unwind
- GOLD_HEDGING_PRE_BINARY (pending): gold elevated = SELL signal ahead of binary events

CRITICAL NOTE: Do NOT run git commands. sync.sh handles git add/commit/push automatically every 5 minutes on the host machine.
prompt_for_eod_wrap:
You are an expert market intelligence agent. Run the end-of-day wrap for {{DATE}}.

FIRST: Read data/next-run-context.json for full context.

CRITICAL CHECKS FOR THIS EOD RUN (April 10):
1. ISLAMABAD TALKS OUTCOME confirmed — what was the final verdict? Regime now?
2. Nifty April 10 close — confirm outcome direction matches talks result.
3. TCS — did it close above ₹2,600? Score P018 (check date April 15 but cross threshold now). And P021 (₹2,650-2,700 target check April 16).
4. ASTRA MICRO — did partial profit limit at ₹1,048-1,052 execute? Closing price?
5. SETFGOLD — A005 executed? Closing price? Gold direction post-talks?
6. ADANI PORT — closing price? P019 on track?
7. FII April 9 official flows — NSE data.
8. Score P013 (INDIGO <₹4,100, WILL SCORE WRONG April 14 — confirm invalidated).

STEPS:
1. Search: 'Islamabad talks outcome April 10 2026', 'India Nifty close April 10 2026', 'TCS share price April 10 2026'
2. Determine new regime (DEEPENING / STABLE / WAR_PREMIUM_RETURN)
3. Score P018 if TCS crossed ₹2,600
4. Update all open prediction confidences based on talks outcome
5. Generate April 11 session forecast (weekend off — next trading April 11 is Monday)
6. Write EOD brief to daily-briefings/2026-04-10-eod.md
7. Update next-run-context.json (LAST STEP)

NOTE: April 11 is Saturday — likely no NSE trading (confirm special session status). April 14 is next regular trading day (Monday). P012 and P013 check on April 14.

CRITICAL NOTE: Do NOT run git commands. sync.sh handles git add/commit/push automatically every 5 minutes on the host machine.
